rows.description: Needham Public Schools - Municipal Information Technology

summary.note: Data extracted from FY2027 Needham Budget document pages 33-40. Minuteman Regional High School Assessment increased 14.0% ($312,996) due to regional school budget increases and increased student enrollment. Needham Public Schools increased 4.0% ($4,051,882). Municipal IT (supporting schools cybersecurity and infrastructure) increased 12.6% ($315,587).
